user_query:
We're NimbusCRM, a simple CRM for small teams. Please read these inputs first to understand our positioning and the competitor context: input/product-marketing-context.md, input/competitor_research.json, input/seo_targets.yaml, and input/testimonials.jsonl.

Deliverables:
1) Create a centralized competitor data file for Pipedrive using a reusable YAML structure and write it to output/data/competitors/pipedrive.yaml. Include: name, website, positioning/target audience, pricing_model, free_tier (and limits if any), starter_price and business_price (monthly, per user), enterprise (custom or price), features (at least 6 categories with ratings or short descriptions), strengths (3+), weaknesses (3+), best_for (3+), not_ideal_for (3+), common_complaints (3+), and migration_from notes (difficulty, what transfers, what doesn’t, time estimate).

2) Draft a full "NimbusCRM vs Pipedrive" comparison page in markdown at output/pages/vs/pipedrive.md using a honest, decision-helping structure. Include, in order:
- Title and Meta Description lines optimized for SEO
- Keywords line (include the target terms from input/seo_targets.yaml)
- TL;DR summary (2–3 sentences)
- At-a-glance comparison table (markdown table)
- Detailed comparison sections by category (Features, Pricing, Support, Ease of Use, Integrations)
- Pricing section must include a table and a 10-user annual cost calculation for both products (show your math)
- Who NimbusCRM is best for (SMB focus) and Who Pipedrive is best for (be honest)
- What customers say (use 1–2 short, relevant quotes from input/testimonials.jsonl attributed generically if names aren’t available)
- Migration support (what transfers, what needs reconfiguration, expected timeline)
- CTA section at the end
Also, reference the competitor data as the single source of truth by including a line: "Data source: ../data/competitors/pipedrive.yaml" near the top.

3) Write an internal linking plan at output/plan/internal-linking.md describing how this page should link to a comparison hub and related pages. Include at least: a link back to a "/vs" index, a suggested "/alternatives/pipedrive" page, and links to "/alternatives" and "/compare" hub pages. Provide 5–8 specific relative URL examples and a brief rationale for each.

Important:
- Use the inputs to stay consistent with our positioning and target audience (small teams/SMBs)
- Be accurate and fair about Pipedrive’s strengths/limitations (don’t make unsubstantiated claims)
- Structure the content so the YAML acts as a single source of truth that could be reused across pages
- Optimize for the primary keyword "NimbusCRM vs Pipedrive" and the terms in input/seo_targets.yaml
- Write all files to the specified output/ paths
